name: Yii2 PHP & MariaDB (Fixed)
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y default-mysql-server && sudo service mariadb start && sleep 5 && sudo mariadb -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS db_pubman; DROP USER IF EXISTS 'pubman_app'@'localhost'; CREATE USER 'pubman_app'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'pubmanapp'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON db_pubman.* TO 'pubman_app'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" && sudo mariadb -u root db_pubman < schema.sql
